response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience, well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with direct exposure to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at re:cinq and Optilyz. Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD background and craftsmanship orientation align with the team's quality expectations, though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed and Kotlin/Java exposure is limited.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP code generator experience at re:cinq matches a key requirement
Strong TDD/testing culture, workshop instructor, and authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention; testing experience is heavier on D/Selenium than Jest/Vitest/Playwright
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work — Java appears only in older robotic-arm/mobile orchestration projects
Cloud/Kubernetes experience is mentioned briefly (GISCollective, AWS CDK at Optilyz) but not deeply demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit Nest.js and Kotlin proficiency
